text.message: Had to solo someone and couldn’t decide
And no worries I did same thing
I hate the timer to move it. Should be longer lol
this turned into a ask for robber game?
red's control of wheat is too strong
honestly i did not know he was going to do that
I literally had no space it was just only option
Five straight robs on me too by Oj and contributed to two plows
that 4 came out. it was a 1/5 steal
red had it but he bought a d card
I know it is not personal to you lol just to me
He probably had the cards for that anyway
but nobody is gonna block that brick 6 .. eventually i would have get it back
I could have kept pace w blacks brick
Game just wants OJ to win
That is a tall task but let’s try
Just to extend game a bit haha
I don’t have mono position on OJ
So I could never hurt him
Should’ve soloed black for that lol
